title: tarrietia sylvatica
intro: Tarrietia sylvatica, also known as the New Caledonian Tarata or Tarata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used by indigenous communities in New Caledonia to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of respiratory infections. Tarrietia sylvatica is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its leaves and roots are used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves.
